showHud.title: Show Debug HUD
showHud.description: Show the navmesh info and NPC state panels. Press N to toggle at runtime.

navmeshAsset.title: Navmesh Binary
navmeshAsset.description: Pre-built Recast navmesh (.bin). Leave empty to use direct movement.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: Key from NPC_PERSONALITIES (aggressive, cautious, heroic, tactical, chaotic, greedy, cowardly, grumpy)

playerEntity.title: Player Entity
playerEntity.description: The player entity. Auto-detected if left empty.

rotationOffset.title: Y Rotation Offset (deg)
rotationOffset.description: Extra Y-rotation added to the aim angle. Use 180 if the model faces +Z in its bind pose.

modelXRotation.title: Model X Rotation Fix (deg)
modelXRotation.description: Corrects baked X rotation in animations. Set to -90 for FBX models exported with Z-up.

navmeshOffset.title: Navmesh Offset
navmeshOffset.description: World-space offset (Factory_collider_01a position) applied when converting between PlayCanvas coords and navmesh coords.

lightnessData.title: Lightness Data
lightnessData.description: lightness.json grid for NPC lighting. Auto-detected if left empty.

deadZoneLow.title: Low Dead Zone
deadZoneLow.description: Radial thickness of inner dead zone of pad's joysticks. This dead zone ensures that all pads report a value of 0 for each joystick axis when untouched.

deadZoneHigh.title: High Dead Zone
deadZoneHigh.description: Radial thickness of outer dead zone of pad's joysticks. This dead zone ensures that all pads can reach the -1 and 1 limits of each joystick axis.

turnSpeed.title: Turn Speed
turnSpeed.description: Maximum turn speed in degrees per second

deadZone.title: Dead Zone
deadZone.description: Radial thickness of inner dead zone of the virtual joysticks. This dead zone ensures the virtual joysticks report a value of 0 even if a touch deviates a small amount from the initial touch.

turnSpeed.title: Turn Speed
turnSpeed.description: Maximum turn speed in degrees per second

radius.title: Radius
radius.description: The radius of the virtual joystick in CSS pixels.

_doubleTapInterval.title: Double Tap Interval
_doubleTapInterval.description: The time in milliseconds between two taps of the right virtual joystick for a double tap to register. A double tap will trigger a jump.
